title: Blaze Heropack
body:
![Logo of Heropack.](https://i.imgur.com/ICTfyKW.png)

A simple Heropack for the [Fisk's Superheroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fiskheroes) Mod which adds a couple of suits.

![Suits on Heropack.](https://i.imgur.com/pjAWwMv.png)

## How to install:

Download the LATEST Fisk's Superheroes Mod
Download Blaze Heropack
Open Minecraft and go into your world
Click ESC on your keyboard, click Options > click HeroPacks > click Open heropack folder
Drag Blaze Heropack to the folder (do not unzip the file)
Done!

## Suit list:

### DC:
• Deadman (Comics)

• Superman (Comics)

### Marvel:
• Spider-Man 2099 (Comics)

• Scarlet-Spider (Comics)

• Spider-Man (Comics)

• Spider-Man Unlimited

• Bombastic Bag-Man (Comics)

## Commands:

- Command to reload heropack:
- /fiskheroes reload --resources
- Command to reload sound:
- /fiskheroes reload --flushSoundCache
- Command to reload heropack and sound:
- /fiskheroes reload --resources --flushSoundCache
- Command to give yourself suit:
- /suit

## Blaze Heropack Official Discord
[Join our community to stay updated and share ideas!](https://discord.gg/jQznRHNGyz)

## Warning:
Do not re-upload, steal, or copy anything.
